title: ジュニアカップにむけて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
The Junior Cup... If I can show what I'm made of
here, the Classics will only be a leap away.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I've always dreamed about racing in the Classics.
Maybe McQueen won't even be there...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Aaaahh! No, no, no! Stop that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm filled with bad thoughts of being relieved if
McQueen isn't there!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I'm this quick to get wimpy, forget about the
Classics... I won't even make it past today!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Trainer, yell some sense into me! I deserve it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Yeah... I promised that I'd get stronger.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I have to show that I can do it! Both to you and to
my grandma—she still believes in me too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
If I'm really gonna become the buffest of the buff,
then it shouldn't matter who I race against!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: So keep your eyes on me today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna prove here today that I, Mejiro Ryan,
am worthy of racing in the Classics!
